text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Guess what, Trainer?! I've got myself a new fan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
She's still just a little girl, but as soon as she saw
me singing downtown, she said she fell in love!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And you know what? She was even wearing
ribbons that matched mine!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe in a few years, we can even be in an idol
group together? Yeah! Let's make that happen!
